ddls:
CREATE TABLE "weather_data" (
  "record_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each weather data record */,
  "station_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the observation station */,
  "instrument_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the instrument used for measurement */,
  "timestamp_utc" TEXT /* Timestamp of the data record in UTC */,
  "temperature" REAL /* Air temperature at 2 meters above ground level */,
  "humidity" REAL /* Relative humidity */,
  "global_radiation" INTEGER /* Global solar radiation */,
  "direct_radiation" INTEGER /* Direct solar radiation */,
  "diffuse_radiation" INTEGER /* Diffuse solar radiation */,
  "infrared_radiation" INTEGER /* Infrared radiation */,
  "wind_speed_10m" REAL /* Wind speed at 10 meters above ground level */,
  "wind_direction_10m" INTEGER /* Wind direction at 10 meters above ground level */,
  "station_pressure" INTEGER /* Station pressure */,
  "data_quality_flag" TEXT /* Flag indicating the quality of the data */,
  "data_version" INTEGER /* Version number of the dataset */,
  "processed_timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp when the data was processed */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("record_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_weather_data_station_id FOREIGN KEY ("station_id") REFERENCES stations ("station_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "stations" (
  "station_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each observation station */,
  "station_name" TEXT /* Name of the observation station */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the observation station */,
  "latitude" REAL /* Latitude of the station */,
  "longitude" REAL /* Longitude of the station */,
  "altitude" REAL /* Altitude of the station */,
  "station_type" TEXT /* Type of the station (e.g., urban, rural) */,
  "operational_status" TEXT /* Operational status of the station (e.g., active, inactive, maintenance) */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for inquiries about the station */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("station_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., researcher, data analyst, admin) */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department of the user */,
  "last_login_timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last login */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password for authentication */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Indicates if the user account is active */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "record_id" INTEGER /* ID of the weather data record being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the data */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the data was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the data was accessed */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent of the browser or application used for access */,
  "access_duration" INTEGER /* Duration of the access in seconds */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_record_id FOREIGN KEY ("record_id") REFERENCES weather_data ("record_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
